title: Upcoming Cars in India 2026: Top SUV & EV Launches (Full List)
description: Explore the most awaited upcoming cars in India 2026 including SUVs, EV cars, facelifts, and hybrid models from Renault, Maruti, Tata, Skoda, and Toyota.

sections.heading: Overview
body: India's automobile market in 2026 is set for major growth with new SUV launches, EV cars, and hybrid vehicles dominating the segment.
Brands like Renault, Maruti Suzuki, Tata, Skoda, and Toyota are focusing on advanced safety, fuel efficiency, and electric mobility.
If you are searching for upcoming cars in India 2026, this list covers the most trending and highly anticipated models.

sections.heading: Top Upcoming Cars in India 2026
body: Here are the most searched upcoming car launches in India 2026:

cards.name: Renault Duster 2026 (Big Comeback SUV)
cards.description: New Renault Duster 2026 SUV returns with hybrid and petrol options. Price: ₹10–18 lakh. One of the most trending SUV launches in India 2026.

cards.name: Maruti Suzuki Brezza 2026 Facelift
cards.description: Updated compact SUV with modern design, better mileage, and expected ADAS features. Price: ₹8–14 lakh.

cards.name: Tata Sierra EV
cards.description: Upcoming electric SUV in India 2026 with long range battery, modern tech, and strong road presence. Expected price: ₹15 lakh.

cards.name: Skoda Kushaq Facelift 2026
cards.description: Premium SUV facelift with improved interiors, advanced safety features, and new technology upgrades.

cards.name: Toyota Urban Cruiser EV / Ebella
cards.description: New Toyota electric SUV focused on reliability, long driving range, and advanced EV technology. Price: ₹18–22 lakh.

sections.heading: Why These Cars Are Trending in 2026
body: High demand for SUV cars in India
Rapid growth of electric vehicle (EV) market
Advanced safety features like ADAS becoming standard
Better mileage and hybrid technology adoption

title: KTM 390 Duke 2026: New 398.63cc Engine with Sharper Performance
description: The KTM 390 Duke 2026 comes with a new 398.63cc engine, sharper looks, and improved performance, making it one of the most powerful lightweight streetfighters.

sections.heading: Overview
body: The KTM 390 Duke 2026 is equipped with a new 398.63cc single-cylinder liquid-cooled engine, replacing the previous 373cc engine.
It brings sharper looks, better performance, and improved ride dynamics suitable for both city riding and highway cruising.
This bike continues to stay at the top for riders who want strong power in a lightweight package.

sections.heading: Key Details
body: New generation 398.63cc engine replacing 373cc unit
Sharper looks with improved performance and ride dynamics
Still a top choice for power-to-weight performance riders

sections.heading: Specifications
body: Price: INR 2.95 - 3.20 lakh
Mileage: 25 - 30 kmpl
Engine: 398.63cc single-cylinder liquid-cooled engine

sections.heading: Pros
body: Refined 398.63cc engine with strong performance
Aggressive streetfighter design
Excellent handling and ride dynamics
Modern features and electronics

sections.heading: Cons
body: Higher maintenance cost
Firm ride quality on long rides

sections.heading: Verdict
body: The KTM 390 Duke 2026 remains one of the most exciting lightweight performance bikes in India with its updated engine and aggressive design.

title: Top 5+ Upcoming Car Launches in India - April 2026
description: April 2026 is set to bring exciting new car launches in India including SUVs, EVs, and luxury sedans. Here is a quick look at the most awaited upcoming cars this month.

sections.heading: Overview
body: April 2026 is shaping up to be an exciting month for the Indian automobile market with multiple new launches across different segments.
From electric vehicles to premium sedans and practical SUVs, buyers will have a wide range of choices.
If you are planning to buy a new car, these upcoming models are worth keeping an eye on.

sections.heading: Upcoming Cars List

cards.name: Toyota Urban Cruiser Ebella

sections.heading: What Makes These Launches Important
body: The growing number of EV launches shows a strong shift toward electric mobility in India.
SUVs continue to dominate the market with new options in different price segments.
Luxury brands are also expanding their portfolios with technology and comfort-focused vehicles.

title: Best EV Cars in India (2026): Range, Price, Charging
description: Electric car demand in India is growing fast in 2026. Here are the top EVs to watch based on real-world range, price, and charging convenience.

sections.heading: Top EV Picks
body: Tata Curvv EV - Good highway stability with practical range for daily and weekend use.
MG ZS EV - Reliable charging ecosystem and family-friendly cabin comfort.
Mahindra XUV.e8 - Feature-rich SUV expected to target premium EV buyers.
Hyundai Creta EV - Mainstream SUV appeal with easy usability and brand trust.
BYD Atto 3 - Strong battery tech and smooth driving refinement.

sections.heading: Buying Tips
body: Check your daily running distance and choose battery size accordingly.
Look at nearby fast-charging points before finalizing a model.
Compare warranty terms for battery and drivetrain, not just ex-showroom price.

title: Top ADAS Cars Under 25 Lakh in India (2026)
description: Advanced driver assistance systems are now available in more affordable cars. This guide highlights strong ADAS options under 25 lakh in India.

sections.heading: Recommended Models
body: Honda City e:HEV - Trusted ADAS package with predictable lane and braking assistance.
Hyundai Verna - Strong safety feature list with smart highway support systems.
Kia Seltos - Good balance of tech, features, and family usability.
MG Astor - Popular for feature-rich cabin and accessible ADAS functions.
Mahindra XUV700 (select variants) - Segment benchmark for safety tech coverage.

sections.heading: Who Should Buy
body: Frequent highway users who want extra confidence during long drives.
Family buyers who prioritize preventive safety features.
Drivers moving from basic cars and wanting modern assistance systems.
